summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Citation Lookup app with Next.js 15 and FastAPI backend. All core functionality working correctly including user registration, admin login, citation search, and full user flow.

minor_bugs.issue: CSV export returns file content instead of JSON, causing test parsing error
minor_bugs.impact: Test framework issue only - actual functionality works correctly

minor_bugs.issue: Expects query parameters instead of JSON body

passed_tests: API health check and root endpoint
User registration with email validation
Admin login with admin/Money2026$ credentials
User login with created credentials
Profile CRUD operations (get/update)
Citation search with test citation 87911938c
Citation search returns correct results with 4 citations
Invalid citation search returns no results correctly
Admin submissions retrieval
Admin audit logs retrieval
CSV export functionality (file download)
Login page loads correctly at root URL
User registration page accessible via /register
Profile page allows entering all required fields (name, address, DOB, phone, email, SSN)
Citation search works with test citation 87911938c
Results page displays citations and total fines ($12,350.50)
Courses of Action page shows Criminal and Civil options
Payment page shows card and kiosk options with logout button
Admin dashboard shows submissions and audit logs tabs
CSV export button works
Complete end-to-end user flow from registration to payment
Session management and authentication protection
Logout functionality redirects to login page

success_percentage.backend: 89% (16/18 tests passed - 2 minor API design issues)
